mapper.select: /* partnerPointSettleMapper.getJejuPointList */ SELECT A.PARTNER_ID , B.SELF_CSTMR_CI AS MEMBER_CI , SUM(NVL(A.REQ_POINT, 0)) AS POINT , SUM(NVL(A.REQ_POINT, 0)) AS AMOUNT FROM MSP_PARTNER_POINT_MST A , MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO B WHERE A.PARTNER_ID = #{partnerId} AND A.SEND_FLAG = 'R' AND A.FULL_PAY_YN = 'Y' AND A.PAY_RESULT IN ('X','F') AND A.CUSTOMER_ID = B.CUSTOMER_ID AND B.SELF_CSTMR_CI IS NOT NULL GROUP BY A.PARTNER_ID, B.SELF_CSTMR_CI
mapper.insert: /* partnerPointSettleMapper.insertJejuPointList */ INSERT INTO MSP_PARTNER_JEJUAIR_01 (BILL_YM , MEMBER_CI , POINT , REGST_ID , REGST_DTTM) SELECT TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') , B.SELF_CSTMR_CI AS MEMBER_CI , SUM(NVL(A.REQ_POINT, 0)) AS AMOUNT , 'POINT' , SYSDATE FROM MSP_PARTNER_POINT_MST A , MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO B WHERE A.PARTNER_ID = #{partnerId} AND A.SEND_FLAG = 'R' AND A.FULL_PAY_YN = 'Y' AND A.PAY_RESULT IN ('X','F') AND A.CUSTOMER_ID = B.CUSTOMER_ID AND B.SELF_CSTMR_CI IS NOT NULL GROUP BY A.PARTNER_ID, B.SELF_CSTMR_CI
mapper.select: /* partnerPointSettleMapper.getGiftiPointList */ SELECT CONTRACT_NUM , CTN , POINT , USG_YM FROM ( SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM , B.SUBSCRIBER_NO AS CTN , SUM(A.REQ_POINT) AS POINT , A.USG_YM FROM MSP_PARTNER_POINT_MST A , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO B WHERE A.SEND_FLAG = 'R' AND A.FULL_PAY_YN = 'Y' AND A.PAY_RESULT IN ('X', 'F') AND A.PARTNER_ID = #{partnerId} AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM GROUP BY A.CONTRACT_NUM, B.SUBSCRIBER_NO, A.USG_YM ) WHERE POINT > 0
mapper.insert: /* partnerPointSettleMapper.insertGiftiPointList */ INSERT INTO MSP_PARTNER_GIFTI_01 (LINK_YM , USG_YM , CONTRACT_NUM , CTN , POINT , REGST_ID , REGST_DTTM) SELECT TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') AS LINK_YM , USG_YM , CONTRACT_NUM , CTN , POINT , 'POINT' , SYSDATE FROM ( SELECT A.USG_YM , A.CONTRACT_NUM , B.SUBSCRIBER_NO AS CTN , SUM(A.REQ_POINT) AS POINT FROM MSP_PARTNER_POINT_MST A , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO B WHERE A.SEND_FLAG = 'R' AND A.FULL_PAY_YN = 'Y' AND A.PAY_RESULT IN ('X', 'F') AND A.PARTNER_ID = #{partnerId} AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM GROUP BY A.CONTRACT_NUM, B.SUBSCRIBER_NO, A.USG_YM ) WHERE POINT > 0
mapper.select: /* partnerPointSettleMapper.getTmoneyPointList */ SELECT CONTRACT_NUM , UICC , CTN , POINT , BILL_YM FROM ( SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM , B.ICC_ID AS UICC , B.SUBSCRIBER_NO AS CTN , SUM(A.REQ_POINT) AS POINT , A.BILL_YM FROM MSP_PARTNER_POINT_MST A , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO B WHERE A.SEND_FLAG = 'R' AND A.FULL_PAY_YN = 'Y' AND A.PAY_RESULT IN ('X', 'F') AND A.PARTNER_ID = #{partnerId} AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM GROUP BY A.CONTRACT_NUM, A.BILL_YM, B.SUBSCRIBER_NO, B.ICC_ID ) WHERE POINT > 0
mapper.insert: /* partnerPointSettleMapper.insertTmoneyPointList */ INSERT INTO MSP_PARTNER_TMONEY_01 (LINK_YM , CONTRACT_NUM , UICC , CTN , POINT , BILL_YM , REGST_ID , REGST_DTTM) SELECT TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') AS BILL_YM , CONTRACT_NUM , UICC , CTN , POINT , BILL_YM , 'POINT' , SYSDATE FROM ( SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM , B.ICC_ID AS UICC , B.SUBSCRIBER_NO AS CTN , SUM(A.REQ_POINT) AS POINT , A.BILL_YM FROM MSP_PARTNER_POINT_MST A , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO B WHERE A.SEND_FLAG = 'R' AND A.FULL_PAY_YN = 'Y' AND A.PAY_RESULT IN ('X', 'F') AND A.PARTNER_ID = #{partnerId} AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM GROUP BY A.CONTRACT_NUM, A.BILL_YM, B.SUBSCRIBER_NO, B.ICC_ID ) WHERE POINT > 0
mapper.select: SELECT 'NAC' AS EVNT_CD , A.CONTRACT_NUM , A.SUBSCRIBER_NO , A.CUSTOMER_ID , C.RATE_CD , FN_GET_RATENM(C.RATE_CD) AS RATE_NM , 'A' AS STAT_CD , '99991231235959' AS END_DTTM , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS STRT_DTTM /* 오전 9시 이전 이벤트 발생시 오전 10시 일괄 발송 오전 9시 00분 ~ 오후 8시 59분부터 문자 즉시 발송 이후 발생시 익일 10시 일괄 발송 */ , CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24') < '09' THEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || '100000' WHEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24') BETWEEN '09' AND '20' THEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') ELSE TO_CHAR(SYSDATE + 1, 'YYYYMMDD') || '100000' END REQ_SEND_DATE FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO A , MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO B , MSP_PARTNER_RATE_MST C , MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO D WHERE A.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AND A.PPPO = 'PO' AND A.SUB_STATUS <> 'C' AND A.REG_DTTM >= (SYSDATE - 10/24/60) AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND B.SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' AND B.APP_END_DATE = (SELECT MAX(APP_END_DATE) FROM MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND SERVICE_TYPE = B.SERVICE_TYPE) AND B.SOC = C.RATE_CD AND C.PARTNER_ID = #{partnerId} AND C.POINT_TYPE = 'PT03' AND C.USE_YN = 'Y' AND A.CUSTOMER_ID = D.CUSTOMER_ID AND D.CUSTOMER_TYPE = 'I' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM MSP_INSR_MEMBER_MST WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') BETWEEN STRT_DTTM AND END_DTTM) UNION ALL /* 요금제변경(타 요금제 -> 생활안심요금제) */ SELECT 'SCH_IN' AS EVNT_CD , B.CONTRACT_NUM , B.SUBSCRIBER_NO , B.CUSTOMER_ID , C.RATE_CD , FN_GET_RATENM(C.RATE_CD) AS RATE_NM , 'A' AS STAT_CD , '99991231235959' AS END_DTTM , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS STRT_DTTM /* 중복된 문자를 발송하지 않기 위하여 체크 */ , CASE WHEN NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM MSP_INSR_MEMBER_MST WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM AND CUSTOMER_ID = B.CUSTOMER_ID AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') BETWEEN STRT_DTTM AND END_DTTM AND STAT_CD = 'A') THEN CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24') < '09' THEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || '100000' WHEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24') BETWEEN '09' AND '20' THEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') ELSE TO_CHAR(SYSDATE + 1, 'YYYYMMDD') || '100000' END ELSE 'X' END REQ_SEND_DATE FROM MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO A , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO B , MSP_PARTNER_RATE_MST C , MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO D WHERE A.SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' AND A.EVNT_CD = 'SCH' AND A.EVNT_TRTM_DT >= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 10/24/60, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND A.APP_END_DATE = (SELECT MAX(APP_END_DATE) FROM MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM AND SERVICE_TYPE = A.SERVICE_TYPE) AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND B.SUB_STATUS <> 'C' AND A.SOC = C.RATE_CD AND C.PARTNER_ID = #{partnerId} AND C.POINT_TYPE = 'PT03' AND C.USE_YN = 'Y' AND B.CUSTOMER_ID = D.CUSTOMER_ID AND D.CUSTOMER_TYPE = 'I' /* 해지를 위하여 정지복구하는 경우가 있음 ( 정지 -> 정지복구 -> 해지 ) */ AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO_HIST WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND EVNT_CD IN ('SUS','RSP','CAN','RCL','MCN') AND EVNT_TRTM_DT >= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 10/24/60, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')) UNION ALL /* 요금제변경 ( 생활안심요금제 -> 타 요금제 ) */ SELECT 'SCH_OUT' AS EVNT_CD , A.CONTRACT_NUM , C.SUBSCRIBER_NO , C.CUSTOMER_ID , A.RATE_CD , FN_GET_RATENM(A.RATE_CD) AS RATE_NM , 'C' AS STAT_CD , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS END_DTTM , '' AS STRT_DTTM , CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24') < '09' THEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || '100000' WHEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24') BETWEEN '09' AND '20' THEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') ELSE TO_CHAR(SYSDATE + 1, 'YYYYMMDD') || '100000' END REQ_SEND_DATE FROM MSP_INSR_MEMBER_MST A , MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO B , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO C WHERE TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') BETWEEN A.STRT_DTTM AND A.END_DTTM AND A.STAT_CD = 'A' AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND B.EVNT_CD = 'SCH' AND B.SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' AND B.EVNT_TRTM_DT >= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 10/24/60, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND B.APP_END_DATE = (SELECT MAX(APP_END_DATE) FROM MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND SERVICE_TYPE = B.SERVICE_TYPE) AND B.CONTRACT_NUM = C.CONTRACT_NUM AND C.SUB_STATUS <> 'C' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM MSP_PARTNER_RATE_MST WHERE PARTNER_ID = #{partnerId} AND POINT_TYPE = 'PT03' AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND RATE_CD = B.SOC) UNION ALL /* 정지/정지복구/해지/해지복구/명의변경 */ SELECT A.EVNT_CD , A.CONTRACT_NUM , B.SUBSCRIBER_NO , B.CUSTOMER_ID , C.RATE_CD , FN_GET_RATENM(C.RATE_CD) AS RATE_NM , CASE WHEN A.EVNT_CD IN ('SUS', 'CAN') THEN 'C' ELSE 'A' END AS STAT_CD , CASE WHEN A.EVNT_CD IN ('SUS', 'CAN') THEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') ELSE '99991231235959' END AS END_DTTM , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS STRT_DTTM , CASE WHEN NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM MSP_INSR_MEMBER_MST WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM AND CUSTOMER_ID = B.CUSTOMER_ID AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') BETWEEN STRT_DTTM AND END_DTTM) THEN CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24') < '09' THEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || '100000' WHEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24') BETWEEN '09' AND '20' THEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') ELSE TO_CHAR(SYSDATE + 1, 'YYYYMMDD') || '100000' END ELSE 'X' END REQ_SEND_DATE FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO_HIST A , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO B , MSP_INSR_MEMBER_MST C WHERE A.EVNT_CD IN ('SUS','RSP','CAN','RCL','MCN') AND A.EVNT_CHANGE_DATE >= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 10/24/60, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND A.EVNT_CHANGE_DATE = (SELECT MAX(EVNT_CHANGE_DATE) FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO_HIST WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM) AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND B.CONTRACT_NUM = C.CONTRACT_NUM AND C.END_DTTM = (SELECT MAX(END_DTTM) FROM MSP_INSR_MEMBER_MST WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM)

/* partnerPointSettleMapper.selectPartnerDongbuHist */
SELECT TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS SEND_DT , A.CONTRACT_NUM , B.SUB_LINK_NAME AS CUST_NM , B.SUBSCRIBER_NO AS CTN , A.MINOR_AGENT_NM , A.MINOR_AGENT_TEL , B.SUB_STATUS , SUBSTR(A.STRT_DTTM, 1, 8) AS JOIN_DT , DECODE(A.STAT_CD, 'A', '', SUBSTR(A.END_DTTM, 1, 8)) AS CHANGE_DT , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.STRT_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') + 1, 'YYYYMMDD') AS EFCT_STRT_DT , A.RATE_CD , FN_GET_RATENM(A.RATE_CD) AS RATE_NM , B.OPEN_AGNT_CD , FN_GET_ORGNM(B.OPEN_AGNT_CD) AS OPEN_AGNT_NM /* 수납정보가 없는 최초 가입자에 한하여 수납(Y) 적용, 정산시에는 펜딩(P) 적용 */ , (CASE WHEN NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM CLS_BILL_PYMN_DATA WHERE SVC_CNTR_NO = B.SVC_CNTR_NO AND BILL_RFLC_IND_CD = 'B') THEN 'P' WHEN FN_GET_UNPD_AMNT(A.CONTRACT_NUM) > 0 THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END) AS PYMN_YN FROM MSP_INSR_MEMBER_MST A , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO B WHERE A.END_DTTM = (SELECT MAX(END_DTTM) FROM MSP_INSR_MEMBER_MST WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM) AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM
mapper.insert:
/* partnerPointSettleMapper.insertPartnerDongbuHist */
INSERT INTO MSP_PARTNER_DONGBU_01 ( SEND_DT , CONTRACT_NUM , CUST_NM , CTN , MINOR_AGENT_NM , MINOR_AGENT_TEL , SUB_STATUS , JOIN_DT , CHANGE_DT , EFCT_STRT_DT , RATE_CD , RATE_NM , OPEN_AGNT_CD , OPEN_AGNT_NM , PYMN_YN ) SELECT TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS SEND_DT , A.CONTRACT_NUM , B.SUB_LINK_NAME AS CUST_NM , B.SUBSCRIBER_NO AS CTN , A.MINOR_AGENT_NM , A.MINOR_AGENT_TEL , B.SUB_STATUS , SUBSTR(A.STRT_DTTM, 1, 8) AS JOIN_DT , DECODE(A.STAT_CD, 'A', '', SUBSTR(A.END_DTTM, 1, 8)) AS CHANGE_DT , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.STRT_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') + 1, 'YYYYMMDD') AS EFCT_STRT_DT , A.RATE_CD , FN_GET_RATENM(A.RATE_CD) AS RATE_NM , B.OPEN_AGNT_CD , FN_GET_ORGNM(B.OPEN_AGNT_CD) AS OPEN_AGNT_NM /* 수납정보가 없는 최초 가입자에 한하여 수납(Y) 적용, 정산시에는 펜딩(P) 적용 */ , (CASE WHEN NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM CLS_BILL_PYMN_DATA WHERE SVC_CNTR_NO = B.SVC_CNTR_NO AND BILL_RFLC_IND_CD = 'B') THEN 'P' WHEN FN_GET_UNPD_AMNT(A.CONTRACT_NUM) > 0 THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END) AS PYMN_YN FROM MSP_INSR_MEMBER_MST A , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO B WHERE A.END_DTTM = (SELECT MAX(END_DTTM) FROM MSP_INSR_MEMBER_MST WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM) AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM
mapper.select: /* partnerPointSettleMapper.getInsrMemberMstList */ SELECT A.CUST_NM , A.CTN , NVL(A.MINOR_AGENT_NM, ' ') AS MINOR_AGENT_NM , NVL(A.MINOR_AGENT_TEL, ' ') AS MINOR_AGENT_TEL , A.SUB_STATUS , A.JOIN_DT , NVL(A.CHANGE_DT, ' ') AS CHANGE_DT , A.EFCT_STRT_DT , A.RATE_NM , A.OPEN_AGNT_NM , A.PYMN_YN , B.BIRTH_DT FROM MSP_PARTNER_DONGBU_01 A , MSP_INSR_MEMBER_MST B WHERE A.SEND_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND B.END_DTTM = (SELECT MAX(END_DTTM) FROM MSP_INSR_MEMBER_MST WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM)

/* partnerPointSettleMapper.getLPointList */ SELECT A.PARTNER_ID , A.BILL_YM , A.CUSTOMER_ID , B.SELF_CSTMR_CI , SUM(A.REQ_POINT) AS REQ_POINT FROM MSP_PARTNER_POINT_MST A , MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO B WHERE A.PARTNER_ID = #{partnerId} AND A.SEND_FLAG = 'R' AND A.FULL_PAY_YN = 'Y' AND A.PAY_RESULT IN ('X', 'F') AND A.CUSTOMER_ID = B.CUSTOMER_ID AND B.SELF_CSTMR_CI IS NOT NULL GROUP BY A.PARTNER_ID, A.BILL_YM, A.CUSTOMER_ID, B.SELF_CSTMR_CI
mapper.insert: /* partnerPointSettleMapper.insertLPointList */ INSERT INTO MSP_PARTNER_LPOINT_01 ( LINK_YM , BILL_YM , CUSTOMER_ID , CI , REQ_POINT , REGST_ID , REGST_DTTM ) SELECT TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') AS LINK_YM , A.BILL_YM , A.CUSTOMER_ID , B.SELF_CSTMR_CI , SUM(A.REQ_POINT) AS REQ_POINT , 'POINT' , SYSDATE FROM MSP_PARTNER_POINT_MST A , MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO B WHERE A.PARTNER_ID = #{partnerId} AND A.SEND_FLAG = 'R' AND A.FULL_PAY_YN = 'Y' AND A.PAY_RESULT IN ('X', 'F') AND A.CUSTOMER_ID = B.CUSTOMER_ID AND B.SELF_CSTMR_CI IS NOT NULL GROUP BY A.PARTNER_ID, A.BILL_YM, A.CUSTOMER_ID, B.SELF_CSTMR_CI

/* partnerPointSettleMapper.insertLpointInterface */ INSERT INTO MSP_LPOINT_INTERFACE ( LINK_YM , DATA_01 , DATA_02 , DATA_03 , DATA_04 , DATA_05 , DATA_06 , DATA_07 , DATA_08 , DATA_09 , DATA_10 , DATA_11 , DATA_12 , DATA_13 , DATA_14 , DATA_15 , DATA_16 , DATA_17 , DATA_18 , DATA_19 , DATA_20 , DATA_21 , DATA_22 , DATA_23 , DATA_24 , DATA_25 , DATA_26 , DATA_27 , DATA_28 , DATA_29 , DATA_30 , DATA_31 , DATA_32 , DATA_33 , DATA_34 , DATA_35 , DATA_36 , DATA_37 , DATA_38 , DATA_39 , DATA_40 , DATA_41 , DATA_42 , DATA_43 , DATA_44 , DATA_45 , DATA_46 , DATA_47 , DATA_48 , DATA_49 , DATA_50 , DATA_51 , DATA_52 , DATA_53 , DATA_54 , DATA_55 , DATA_56 , DATA_57 , DATA_58 , DATA_59 , DATA_60 , DATA_61 , DATA_62 , DATA_63 , DATA_64 , DATA_65 , DATA_66 , DATA_67 , DATA_68 , DATA_69 , DATA_70 , DATA_71 , DATA_72 , REGST_ID , REGST_DTTM , RVISN_ID , RVISN_DTTM ) SELECT TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') , 'BD' /* 01.자료구분 */ , '6' /* 02.승인요청방식 */ , ' ' /* 03.고객식별구분코드 */ , RPAD(' ', 37, ' ') /* 04.카드번호 */ , RPAD(' ', 20, ' ') /* 05.고객식별값 */ , RPAD(#{partnerId}, 10, ' ') /* 06.제휴가맹점번호 */ , RPAD(A.CUSTOMER_ID, 19, ' ') /* 07.제휴사승인번호, 거래일기준 고유 번호, M모바일 고객ID */ , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') /* 08.거래일자 */ , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24MISS') /* 09.거래시간 */ , '10' /* 10.거래구분 */ , '100' /* 11.거래사유 */ , '1' /* 12.적립구분 */ , '9' /* 13.거래요청방식구분코드 */ , '2' /* 14.포인트적립구분코드 */ , LPAD(0, 12, 0) /* 15.총매출금액 */ , LPAD(0, 12, 0) /* 16.포인트대상금액 */ , LPAD(0, 12, 0) /* 17.현금매출금액 */ , LPAD(0, 12, 0) /* 18.신용카드매출금액 */ , LPAD(0, 12, 0) /* 19.상품권매출금액 */ , LPAD(0, 12, 0) /* 20.포인트매출금액 */ , LPAD(0, 12, 0) /* 21.기타매출금액 */ , LPAD(SUM(A.REQ_POINT), 9, 0) /* 22.총생성포인트 */ , LPAD(0, 9, 0) /* 23.금회생성포인트(현금) */ , LPAD(0, 9, 0) /* 24.금회생성포인트(카드) */ , LPAD(0, 9, 0) /* 25.금회생성포인트(상품권) */ , LPAD(0, 9, 0) /* 26.금회생성포인트(포인트) */ , LPAD(SUM(A.REQ_POINT), 9, 0) /* 27.금회생성포인트(기타) */ , LPAD(' ', 4, ' ') /* 28.쿠폰번호 */ , ' ' /* 29.반품구분 */ , ' ' /* 30.원거래정보유무 */ , ' ' /* 31.원거래정보구분 */ , RPAD(' ', 19, ' ') /* 32.원거래승인번호 */ , RPAD(' ', 8, ' ') /* 33.원거래일자 */ , RPAD(' ', 40, ' ') /* 34.거래요청정보 */ , RPAD(' ', 20, ' ') /* 35.결제카드번호1 */ , RPAD(' ', 12, ' ') /* 36.결제카드별매출금액 */ , RPAD(' ', 20, ' ') /* 37.결제카드번호2 */ , RPAD(' ', 12, ' ') /* 38.결제카드별매출금액 */ , RPAD(' ', 20, ' ') /* 39.결제카드번호3 */ , RPAD(' ', 12, ' ') /* 40.결제카드별매출금액 */ , RPAD(' ', 20, ' ') /* 41.결제카드번호4 */ , RPAD(' ', 12, ' ') /* 42.결제카드별매출금액 */ , RPAD(' ', 20, ' ') /* 43.결제카드번호5 */ , RPAD(' ', 12, ' ') /* 44.결제카드별매출금액 */ , RPAD(' ', 20, ' ') /* 45.결제카드번호6 */ , RPAD(' ', 12, ' ') /* 46.결제카드별매출금액 */ , RPAD(' ', 20, ' ') /* 47.결제카드번호7 */ , RPAD(' ', 12, ' ') /* 48.결제카드별매출금액 */ , RPAD(' ', 20, ' ') /* 49.결제카드번호8 */ , RPAD(' ', 12, ' ') /* 50.결제카드별매출금액 */ , RPAD(' ', 20, ' ') /* 51.결제카드번호9 */ , RPAD(' ', 12, ' ') /* 52.결제카드별매출금액 */ , RPAD(' ', 10, ' ') /* 53.이벤트코드1 */ , RPAD(' ', 100, ' ') /* 54.이벤트명 */ , RPAD(' ', 12, ' ') /* 55.이벤트매출금액 */ , RPAD(' ', 9, ' ') /* 56.이벤트생성포인트 */ , RPAD(' ', 2, ' ') /* 57.유효기간 */ , RPAD(' ', 10, ' ') /* 58.이벤트코드2 */ , RPAD(' ', 100, ' ') /* 59.이벤트명 */ , RPAD(' ', 12, ' ') /* 60.이벤트매출금액 */ , RPAD(' ', 9, ' ') /* 61.이벤트생성포인트 */ , RPAD(' ', 2, ' ') /* 62.유효기간 */ , RPAD(' ', 10, ' ') /* 63.엘포인트고객번호 */ , RPAD(' ', 9, ' ') /* 64.엘포인트승인번호 */ , RPAD(' ', 8, ' ') /* 65.엘포인트승인일자 */ , RPAD(' ', 6, ' ') /* 66.엘포인트승인시간 */ , RPAD(' ', 9, ' ') /* 67.생성포인트 */ , RPAD(' ', 9, ' ') /* 68.이벤트포인트 */ , RPAD(' ', 2, ' ') /* 69.응답코드 */ , RPAD(' ', 64, ' ') /* 70.응답메세지 */ , RPAD(A.CI, 88, ' ') /* 71.CI */ , RPAD(' ', 12, ' ') /* 72.FILLER */ , 'BATCH' , SYSDATE , 'BATCH' , SYSDATE FROM MSP_PARTNER_LPOINT_01 A WHERE LINK_YM = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') GROUP BY CUSTOMER_ID, CI
mapper.select: /* partnerPointSettleMapper.getLPointReqHeader */ SELECT 'BH' /* 01.자료구분 */ || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') /* 02.작업일자 */ || 'O940' /* 03.전문번호 */ || RPAD('O620', 4, ' ') /* 04.기관코드 */ || RPAD(' ', 1077, ' ') /* 05.FILLER */ AS HEADER_STR FROM DUAL

/* partnerPointSettleMapper.getLPointReqBody */ SELECT A.DATA_01 /* 01.자료구분 */ || A.DATA_02 /* 02.승인요청방식 */ || A.DATA_03 /* 03.고객식별구분코드 */ || A.DATA_04 /* 04.카드번호 */ || A.DATA_05 /* 05.고객식별값 */ || A.DATA_06 /* 06.제휴가맹점번호 */ || A.DATA_07 /* 07.제휴사승인번호, 거래일기준 고유 번호, M모바일 고객ID */ || A.DATA_08 /* 08.거래일자 */ || A.DATA_09 /* 09.거래시간 */ || A.DATA_10 /* 10.거래구분 */ || A.DATA_11 /* 11.거래사유 */ || A.DATA_12 /* 12.적립구분 */ || A.DATA_13 /* 13.거래요청방식구분코드 */ || A.DATA_14 /* 14.포인트적립구분코드 */ || A.DATA_15 /* 15.총매출금액 */ || A.DATA_16 /* 16.포인트대상금액 */ || A.DATA_17 /* 17.현금매출금액 */ || A.DATA_18 /* 18.신용카드매출금액 */ || A.DATA_19 /* 19.상품권매출금액 */ || A.DATA_20 /* 20.포인트매출금액 */ || A.DATA_21 /* 21.기타매출금액 */ || A.DATA_22 /* 22.총생성포인트 */ || A.DATA_23 /* 23.금회생성포인트(현금) */ || A.DATA_24 /* 24.금회생성포인트(카드) */ || A.DATA_25 /* 25.금회생성포인트(상품권) */ || A.DATA_26 /* 26.금회생성포인트(포인트) */ || A.DATA_27 /* 27.금회생성포인트(기타) */ || A.DATA_28 /* 28.쿠폰번호 */ || A.DATA_29 /* 29.반품구분 */ || A.DATA_30 /* 30.원거래정보유무 */ || A.DATA_31 /* 31.원거래정보구분 */ || A.DATA_32 /* 32.원거래승인번호 */ || A.DATA_33 /* 33.원거래일자 */ || A.DATA_34 /* 34.거래요청정보 */ || A.DATA_35 /* 35.결제카드번호1 */ || A.DATA_36 /* 36.결제카드별매출금액 */ || A.DATA_37 /* 37.결제카드번호2 */ || A.DATA_38 /* 38.결제카드별매출금액 */ || A.DATA_39 /* 39.결제카드번호3 */ || A.DATA_40 /* 40.결제카드별매출금액 */ || A.DATA_41 /* 41.결제카드번호4 */ || A.DATA_42 /* 42.결제카드별매출금액 */ || A.DATA_43 /* 43.결제카드번호5 */ || A.DATA_44 /* 44.결제카드별매출금액 */ || A.DATA_45 /* 45.결제카드번호6 */ || A.DATA_46 /* 46.결제카드별매출금액 */ || A.DATA_47 /* 47.결제카드번호7 */ || A.DATA_48 /* 48.결제카드별매출금액 */ || A.DATA_49 /* 49.결제카드번호8 */ || A.DATA_50 /* 50.결제카드별매출금액 */ || A.DATA_51 /* 51.결제카드번호9 */ || A.DATA_52 /* 52.결제카드별매출금액 */ || A.DATA_53 /* 53.이벤트코드1 */ || A.DATA_54 /* 54.이벤트명 */ || A.DATA_55 /* 55.이벤트매출금액 */ || A.DATA_56 /* 56.이벤트생성포인트 */ || A.DATA_57 /* 57.유효기간 */ || A.DATA_58 /* 58.이벤트코드2 */ || A.DATA_59 /* 59.이벤트명 */ || A.DATA_60 /* 60.이벤트매출금액 */ || A.DATA_61 /* 61.이벤트생성포인트 */ || A.DATA_62 /* 62.유효기간 */ || A.DATA_63 /* 63.엘포인트고객번호 */ || A.DATA_64 /* 64.엘포인트승인번호 */ || A.DATA_65 /* 65.엘포인트승인일자 */ || A.DATA_66 /* 66.엘포인트승인시간 */ || A.DATA_67 /* 67.생성포인트 */ || A.DATA_68 /* 68.이벤트포인트 */ || A.DATA_69 /* 69.응답코드 */ || A.DATA_70 /* 70.응답메세지 */ || A.DATA_71 /* 71.CI */ || A.DATA_72 /* 72.FILLER */ AS BODY_STR FROM MSP_LPOINT_INTERFACE A WHERE A.LINK_YM = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM')

/* partnerPointSettleMapper.getLPointReqTrailer */ SELECT 'BT' /* 01.자료구분 */ || LPAD(NVL((SELECT DISTINCT COUNT(1) OVER() FROM MSP_PARTNER_LPOINT_01 WHERE LINK_YM = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') GROUP BY CUSTOMER_ID, CI), 0), 9, 0) /* 02.자료건수 */ || RPAD(' ', 1084, ' ') /* 03.FILLER */ AS TRAILER_STR FROM DUAL
